sections.paragraph: ἀφελότης, ητος, ἡ [ἀ-priv., φελλεύς ‘stony ground’; ‘without a rocky surface, smooth’, hence ‘artless, simple’] ‘a condition characterized by absence of artifice’, simplicity, ἀφελότης ϰαρδίας heartfelt generosity or uncontrived motivation, i.e. a nostrings-attached approach Ac 2:46.
